mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.user_id, d.dept_id, d.doctor_name, d.title, d.specialty, d.doctor_desc, d.avatar, d.status, d.create_time, d.update_time, dept.dept_name, dept.dept_desc, u.username FROM hos_doctor d LEFT JOIN hos_department dept ON d.dept_id = dept.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON d.user_id = u.id WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hos_doctor WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0
